entity.summary: Bitcoin-focused centralized trading and financial-services platform serving individuals and businesses, operating since 2014.
entity.notes: The first-party site states that CoinCorner has operated since 2014 and identifies its Isle of Man corporate registration and regulatory context.

evidence.title: CoinCorner official website
evidence.notes: First-party site presents active Bitcoin buy, sell, account, payment, and business services and states operation since 2014.

evidence.title: CoinCorner exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Exchange registry reference used to corroborate the CoinCorner exchange identity.
